milestone: M1.1 - faithful ChatGPT-style UI + upload progress + inline screenshots
summary: Logged-in UI reworked to a faithful ChatGPT layout: step indicator and metric cards removed from the main view, narrow 260px sidebar, centered single-column conversation (768px content width) with per-message role labels and alternating row bands, centered pill composer with round send button. Upload shows a real XHR progress bar inside the assistant message; analysis renders a progress phase and inline screenshot thumbnails when the result payload exposes frame URLs (upload path is file-level validation only, so it produces no frames by design).

real_upload_e2e.method: headless browser, real account login, real 28.6MB mp4 upload
real_upload_e2e.analysis_reached_terminal: 结果已就绪 / 分析完成
real_upload_e2e.screenshots_note: upload analyzer is file-level validation by design; no frames produced. inline screenshot grid is wired for results that expose frame URLs.
